default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, align on content strategy, and plan upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Prioritize high-intent, tour-specific articles over high-traffic, low-conversion general interest topics to drive revenue directly.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [**Cancun Performance:** Traffic is down post-Sargassum season, mirroring a market-wide trend. A new 1-hour jet ski tour is on hold pending a strategic review.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [**New Tour Launches:** Vallarta is launching two premium experiences: a new Rhythms of the Night show (Dec 1) and a "Gastronomic Journey" fine-dining option (Dec 8).](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**New Travel Guides:** The Marieta Islands guide is now gaining traction, validating the format. Next guides are planned for Yalapa (Vallarta), Tierra Sagrada (Cabo), and Isla Mujeres (Cancun).](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

## Topics

### Cancun Performance & New Tour

  - [**Context:** Cancun traffic is down post-Sargassum season, a market-wide trend expected to recover mid-November.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [**New Tour:** A 1-hour jet ski tour at Bahia Principe is under review.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The location is a 2-hour drive from major hotels, raising concerns about customer willingness to travel for a short activity.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [**Strategic Risk:** The tour may conflict with Ricardo's known view that jet skis are a commodity and not a unique, high-value experience.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [**Decision:** Angie will consult Fernando and Ricardo before publishing any content or adding the tour to the website.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Problem:** High-traffic articles on general topics (e.g., "Facts About Macaws") attract a non-tourist audience, yielding low conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift focus to high-intent, tour-specific content to drive direct revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [**Example:** "Curiosidades Sobre Cameos" (Camels) performs well because it directly links to a core tour.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Example:** "Facts About Macaws" is low-conversion because macaws are a park feature, not the tour's focus.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Successes:**](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
      - **Seasonal Content:** "Packing List for November in Cancun" already ranks \#10, validating the strategy for time-sensitive topics.
      - [**Whale Watching:** Articles were refreshed 1.5 months ago in anticipation of the upcoming season.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)

### New Travel Guides

  - [**Validation:** The Marieta Islands travel guide (launched mid-Sept) is now seeing significant impression growth, confirming the format's long-term potential.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [**Next Guides (in order):**](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
    1.  [**Yalapa (Vallarta):** Replicate the Marieta guide's layout.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
    2.  [**Tierra Sagrada (Cabo):** Replicate the layout to group multiple activities.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
    3.  [**Isla Mujeres (Cancun):** Replicate the layout.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

### Technical Update: Article Categorization

  - [**Status:** The new article categorization system is ready for launch.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**Tonight:** Release notifications to production and create new categories.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**Tomorrow AM:** Begin re-categorizing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [**Contingency:** The blog will be temporarily blank during the transition. The team will prioritize re-populating it with at least 12 articles immediately to ensure content is visible.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Angie:** Consult Fernando and Ricardo on the Cancun jet ski tour before publishing content.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [Publish time-sensitive articles (e.g., Dia de los Muertos, Christmas, NYE).](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [Begin creating the Yalapa travel guide.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [**Saul:**](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [Release article categorization notifications and create categories tonight.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [Oversee article re-categorization tomorrow AM.](https://fathom.video/share/AAfzKxfc59jyGDQ3WvoKA2wMdSL1vvHq?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

action_items.description: Confirm w/ Fernando + Ricardo re: Cancun jet ski; if approved, notify Mariana to publish + promote
Create categories in prod; then Minnesota re-points 12 articles; republish
